## Conceitos-Chave de Liam Ottley

### Frameworks Principais
- **5-Layer AIOS** — Context → Data → Intelligence → Automate → Build
- **Operator Trap** — 80% IN the business, 20% ON the business
- **Compound Automation** — Cada tarefa automatizada libera bandwidth permanente
- **3 KPIs of AIOS** — Autonomy, Automation%, Revenue/Employee
- **Task Audit** — List → Categorize → Prioritize → Automate → Track
- **4-Step Agency Sales** — Lead Gen → Discovery → Proposal (ROI) → Onboarding
- **Agent Architecture** — Context + Tools + Workflows + Guardrails

### Filosofia Central
> "AIOS is methodology, not model. Layers, not leaps."
> "Revenue per employee é o novo flex."
> "AI tricks fail without unifying system to compound."

### Metricas-Chave
- Revenue sprint: $1M NZD em 7 dias
- Task automation target: 60-70% em 30 dias
- Task audit baseline: 83 tasks, 54 automatizaveis
- Bandwidth split: 80/20 → 20/80
- AI agency margins: 80%+
- Agent pricing: $1.5-3K/agent/mes
- AI decisions 2028: 15% (Gartner)
